# Bru Bulgarelli — Brand & Visual Designer

> Bru Bulgarelli is an Italian brand and visual designer based in Verona, Italy, with 30+ years of experience in brand identity, packaging, editorial design and luxury hospitality branding.

She designs brand identities and visual systems for hospitality, cultural and commercial brands, translating strategy into cohesive visual experiences across print and digital. Her practice spans concept through production — brand guidelines, editorial design, packaging, POP displays, wayfinding, and web.

## Site Structure

This portfolio is bilingual: English at /en/ and Italian at /it/. Language is URL-derived; content is identical in both locales.

- Homepage: https://bru-portfolio3.vercel.app/en/
- Experience: https://bru-portfolio3.vercel.app/en/experience — full career timeline
- Capabilities: https://bru-portfolio3.vercel.app/en/capabilities — disciplines and tools
- Selected Works: https://bru-portfolio3.vercel.app/en/selected-works — project archive grid
- Contact: https://bru-portfolio3.vercel.app/en/contact — availability and contact details

Machine-readable resources:
- Sitemap: https://bru-portfolio3.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://bru-portfolio3.vercel.app/robots.txt

## Selected Projects

### Hotel Caesius (BRANDING — 2022)
Visual identity system and brand guidelines for a luxury spa hotel on Lake Garda. Covers all guest touchpoints across print and digital.
URL: https://bru-portfolio3.vercel.app/en/selected-works/hotel-caesius

### Emozione3 (BRANDING — 2016)
Brand system for an Italian gift box company — identity, guidelines, retail environments and communication applications across a scalable visual framework.
URL: https://bru-portfolio3.vercel.app/en/selected-works/emozione3

### Europlan (BRANDING / PRINT — 2017–2024)
10+ years of brand and editorial design for a Lake Garda hospitality group — promotional campaigns, wayfinding, trade-fair assets and print collateral.
URL: https://bru-portfolio3.vercel.app/en/selected-works/europlan

### Kalika (BRANDING / PRINT — 2025)
Brand identity and packaging for a new Italian skincare brand — logo, colour palette, window graphics and a dynamic, feminine visual system.
URL: https://bru-portfolio3.vercel.app/en/selected-works/kalika-skincare

### PAM-Panorama (PRINT / POP — 2005–2010)
Retail communication system for Italy's largest supermarket group — campaigns, in-store materials, POP displays and promotional systems across multiple locations.
URL: https://bru-portfolio3.vercel.app/en/selected-works/pam-panorama

### Il Marmo (EDITORIAL — 2004)
Corporate brochure for a marble company; clean visual narrative from raw material to installation; CMYK with Pantone inks, embossed metallic cover.
URL: https://bru-portfolio3.vercel.app/en/selected-works/il-marmo

### Hotel Nettuno (PAINTINGS / PRINT)
Series of cardboard artworks inspired by Lake Garda landscape; stylised vector graphic language; transparent raised varnish finish.
URL: https://bru-portfolio3.vercel.app/en/selected-works/hotel-nettuno

### Personal Website (UI / UX / PRODUCT — 2026)
Design and development of this portfolio — Swiss-grid aesthetic, React/Vite/Tailwind stack, built with AI-assisted tooling.
URL: https://bru-portfolio3.vercel.app/en/selected-works/personal-website

## Professional Experience

- Freelance (2025 – present): Brand identity and visual communication for hospitality, cultural and commercial clients.
- Lead Designer at Europlan S.p.A. (2017–2024): Brand and communication materials for a portfolio of Italian hotels and residences on Lake Garda. Full production from concept to print.
- Graphic Team Leader at Wishdays S.r.l. (2014–2016): Led in-house design team, developed brand guidelines for multiple brands, implemented XML-based automated layout workflows.
- Graphic Designer at Total Quality Food S.r.l. (2012–2013): Graphic and regulatory support for EU food labelling compliance; trade show and event materials.
- Account & Graphic Designer at Verba DDB S.r.l. (2005–2010): Managed large retail clients including PAM Group, Panorama and Bata Footwear; promotional materials, flyers, POP displays and in-store signage.
- Freelance (2003–2005): Editorial design, multilingual layout, technical manuals, static websites.
- Founder & Co-owner at Pressart S.r.l. (1995–2002): Co-founded a creative agency specialising in branding and printed communication.

## Capabilities

Disciplines: Brand Identity, Visual Systems, Editorial Design, Packaging, POP Materials, Wayfinding, Print Production, Web & Digital Design

Tools: Adobe InDesign, Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Lightroom, Canva, AI tools for creativity and productivity

Working methods: Precision, structured workflows, team coordination, full production management from concept to final artwork.

## Contact

Email: bulgarellibru@gmail.com
Phone: +39 347 3587524
Location: Verona, Italy
Available for freelance brand identity and visual system projects.
